hero.headline: Glow All Flight Long.
hero.subheadline: Premium In-Flight Hydrating Gel Designed To Keep Your Skin Fresh, Dewy & Radiant At Altitude.
hero.primaryCtaPrefill: Hi AirHydra, I want to order the In-Flight Hydrating Gel

problem.headline: Cabin Air Is Destroying Your Skin
problem.description: Aircraft cabins have humidity levels as low as 10% — far below the 40–60% your skin needs. Every long-haul flight leaves you dehydrated, puffy, and dull.

problemPoints.title: Extreme Dryness
problemPoints.description: Low cabin humidity strips moisture from your skin within the first hour of flight.

problemPoints.title: Puffiness & Fatigue
problemPoints.description: Recirculated air and pressure changes cause inflammation and visible tiredness.

benefits.headline: Engineered for Altitude
benefits.subheadline: Every ingredient chosen to combat the unique stress of air travel.

steps.title: Cleanse
steps.desc: Start with a clean face before boarding or shortly after takeoff.

steps.title: Apply
steps.desc: Smooth a small amount of AirHydra over your face and neck.

steps.title: Arrive Glowing
steps.desc: Reapply every 2–3 hours and land looking refreshed and radiant.

lifestyle.headline: Your Skin Deserves First-Class Treatment
lifestyle.description: AirHydra is more than skincare — it's a ritual for the discerning traveller. Engineered for altitude, designed for luxury. Because how you arrive matters.
lifestyle.ctaPrefill: Hi AirHydra, I'd like to order — I want to glow all flight long.

testimonialsList.name: Jessica W.
testimonialsList.text: I used to land with such dull, tired skin. AirHydra is a game-changer. I now arrive looking and feeling fresh.

testimonialsList.name: Alex T.
testimonialsList.text: As a frequent business traveler, this is a must-have. It's the first thing I pack. No more post-flight breakouts.

testimonialsList.name: Priya M.
testimonialsList.text: Finally a product that actually works at altitude. My skin feels incredible after every long-haul flight.

faqList.question: Is AirHydra suitable for all skin types?
faqList.answer: Yes! Our formula is dermatologist-tested and designed to be gentle and effective for sensitive, oily, dry, and combination skin.

faqList.question: How often should I apply it during a flight?
faqList.answer: For best results, we recommend applying a small amount every 2–3 hours during your flight to maintain optimal hydration levels.

faqList.question: Can I use it even if I'm not flying?
faqList.answer: Absolutely. AirHydra is a fantastic daily moisturizer, perfect for combating dry environments like air-conditioned offices or cold climates.

finalCta.headline: Glow All Flight Long.
finalCta.description: Join thousands of travellers who refuse to land looking tired. Order AirHydra now — fast delivery or in-store pickup available.
finalCta.ctaPrefill: Hi AirHydra, I'm ready to order the In-Flight Hydrating Gel.
